25133:
Standing here blinded by this maelstrom
Cutting at me so hard I want to shout out
35793:
But still the only things the rain can wash away
All my excuses and self-doubt
46530: As I stumble and get stuck in so much muddied ground
51820: And the heavy air threatens to suffocate all sound
57276:
Even so this voice of mine will never quiver
And these legs of mine will never stand still
65601: For as long as I can fight!
70071: Keep your eyes on me and only me, attention undivided
75591: I'll sear it into memory, a promise newly evolved
80586:
No matter the pain, I will remain
I want this so bad, it's in my veins
85914: Today I'm making you my witness
